narrative:
Jackson 24 (precinct in Stark County) has 635 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
